news.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
news.summary: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft get more cash in a revenue-share agreement.

news.title: DeepMind’s David Silver just raised $1.1B to build an AI that learns without human data
news.summary: Ineffable Intelligence, a British AI lab founded a mere few months ago by former DeepMind researcher David Silver, has raised $1.1 billion in funding at a valuation of $5.1 billion.

news.title: Hacker who allegedly carried out cyberattacks for China is extradited to U.S.
news.summary: Xu Zewei is accused of participating in a Chinese government hacking group that broke into thousands of U.S. organizations and stole COVID-19-related research.

news.title: Investors back Skye’s AI home screen app for iPhone ahead of launch
news.summary: Skye's new AI app attracted investors before it even launched — a sign of interest in a more AI-aware iPhone.

news.title: Data center demand drives 66% surge in natural gas power plant costs
news.summary: Natural gas power plant costs have nearly doubled in two years and take 23% longer to build as data center electricity demand skyrockets.

news.title: Trump demands ABC fire Jimmy Kimmel
news.summary: President Donald Trump is calling for Disney to fire Jimmy Kimmel. On Thursday, Kimmel joked that Melania Trump had looked like an "expectant widow" in a skit about the upcoming White House Correspondents' Dinner. news.title: Google employees ask Sundar Pichai to say no to classified military AI use
news.summary: Over 600 Google employees signed a letter to CEO Sundar Pichai demanding that Google block the Pentagon from using its AI models for classified purposes, reports the The Washington Post. news.summary: On Saturday evening, a room full of journalists, media personalities, and senior members of Donald Trump's administration descended into chaos as gunshots rang out at the White House Correspondents' Dinner. news.title: China kills Meta’s acquisition of Manus as US-China AI rivalry deepens
news.summary: The unwinding of Meta’s deal shows how tech founders struggle to cut China ties.

news.title: Study: Infrasound likely a key factor in alleged hauntings
news.summary: Low-frequency infrasound (below 20 Hz) can raise cortisol levels in saliva and increase irritability.

news.title: National Science Board eviscerated; Trump admin fires all 22 members
news.summary: Members had planned to release report that US is ceding scientific ground to China.

news.title: Next El Niño could be tipping point for a hotter climate
news.summary: Pacific heat pulse is temporary, but scientists warn that its climate impacts are not.

news.title: A Brain Implant for Depression Is About to Be Tested in Humans
news.summary: While many brain-computer interface companies are focused on helping paralyzed people communicate, Motif Neurotech is targeting mental health disorders.

news.title: Elon Musk’s XChat App Is More Like Facebook’s Messenger Than Signal
